sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37423" key="e)cite/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξιτέον</orth>, <sense id="n37423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must go forth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:3:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
